summary: Independent 4-lens re-review against 4c271bf0f. The plan's reality basis is unusually good (all 31 paths and every core symbol verified; single-lowering-authority sweep clean; Task 3 splice well-shaped) but three blockers and a cluster of convergent majors require plan edits before execution. Task 6 as written cannot succeed: the new image carries a landscape schema widening (run_sources.schema_contract_hash VARCHAR(16)->VARCHAR(32), commit 5966a6580) with no migration path on ECS, so the deploy either crash-loops on schema DIVERGENT or applies the acceptance package's uncommitted Aurora->RDS replacement and destroys the session/audit databases the plan promises to preserve; the forward ALTER also invalidates Step 7's rollback image.

supersedes.note: Prior review validated structure/sequencing; this pass verified claims against the tree and live acceptance package and found execution-blocking gaps the prior pass did not reach.

blocking_issues: TASK 6 / SCHEMA: New image widens run_sources.schema_contract_hash VARCHAR(16)->VARCHAR(32) (5966a6580) with no migration; ECS web container never runs landscape DDL (app.py:356) and init_landscape_schema refuses STALE (schema_probe.py:303-312). Add ALTER TABLE run_sources ALTER COLUMN schema_contract_hash TYPE VARCHAR(32) via schema_role before rolling the service, gate apply on doctor landscape_schema: CURRENT, and state the rollback consequence: after widening, the previous image also sees DIVERGENT, so Step 7 rollback will not boot without narrowing back.

TASK 6 / TERRAFORM PACKAGE: The 'active acceptance-environment changes' include an Aurora->RDS aws_db_instance replacement (storage_identity.tf), the ALB idle_timeout=300 line itself (uncommitted edit, live value unverified, AWS default 60s kills the 270s keep-alive-free POST), listener flip, and a removed secret. Step 4 must machine-abort on any destroy/replace in the saved plan (grep 'will be destroyed|must be replaced' -> exit 1) and verify idle_timeout from the live ALB via describe-load-balancer-attributes, not the working tree.

TASK 5 / ACCEPTANCE INSTRUMENT: The 'sole failure' rule for the known allowlist-loader drift (trust_tier.tier_model 2845->2940, reproduced) cannot detect plan-caused fingerprint rotation. 195 tier-model baseline entries live in 8 files this plan touches and Tasks 1-3 add imports to most. Require the drift signature be byte-identical to a pre-Task-1 recording; if counts move, rotate deliberately or get operator sign-off. Check none of the touched entries are judge-signed before relying on the rotation tool.
major_issues: PROFILE_UNAVAILABLE UNACHIEVABLE AS WRITTEN (3 reviewers convergent): validate_plugin_policy collapses every profile failure to error_code=plugin_unavailable (validation.py:90,201,227,245,258); the discriminator is stage='operator_profile_options'. ValidationEntry has no code field, and guided/audit.py:47 drops 'message' from the audit allowlist, so the reason's field placement is load-bearing. Specify: derive from stage, and name the carrying field. Either add plugin_policy/validation.py to Task 1 Files with a PROFILE_UNAVAILABLE mapping, or assert plugin_unavailable.

EXISTING-TEST REGRESSION UNGUARDED: test_tools.py:393,:427 already assert error_code=='profile_unavailable' for apply_pipeline_recipe; no Task 1/Task 5 selector covers them, so the Step 2 refactor's likely regression escapes the focused package. Widen the selector and state the intended code.

TASK 1 CALL-SITE ENUMERATION INCOMPLETE: web/routes/_helpers.py:1848 (_state_data_from_composer_state) computes PERSISTED is_valid via raw state.validate() and gates runtime preflight skip (:1866); routes/composer/guided.py:949 raw-validates; _dispatch.py:646 has a raw prior-validation fallback that fabricates validation deltas; tools/sessions.py:1624/:1883/:1897 return raw state.validate(). Add these files/paths or state explicitly which are left to dispatcher normalization with a characterization test proving normalization wins.

ADAPTER ALREADY EXISTS TWICE: sessions/service.py:1517-1548 and sessions/routes/_helpers.py:4297-4313 already implement the findings->ValidationEntry->executable_state.validate() sequence Task 1 Step 2 restates. Consolidate onto the new _validate_state_for_catalog or drop the 'sole authority' framing.

PERFORMANCE REGRESSION ON HOT PATHS (measured): _lower_profiled_components calls create_catalog_service() per invocation (validation.py:206) - ~55ms after warmup, gated on snapshot not pipeline - and Task 1 broadens it onto prompts/discovery-cache/tool_batch cache hits that currently pay ~0. Thread PolicyCatalogView._full through validate_plugin_policy (or memoize) BEFORE Task 1 Step 3, and assert no new CatalogServiceImpl per validation.

RECONCILIATION MATRIX TRAPS: (a) llm_model_choice stores its model hash in a field literally named resolved_prompt_template_hash (interpretation_state.py:1111-1112), also in the profile-lowering strip set - extract model_choice_artifact_hash() and dispatch per kind, never field name; (b) raw-cleanup and prompt_injection_shield_recommendation are NOT kinds - InterpretationKind is a closed 5-value enum; they are user_terms on pipeline_decision - match on (kind, user_term); (c) pipeline_decision_artifact_hash RAISES ValueError on unknown user_term (interpretation_state.py:1146) - wrap for structured atomic failure; (d) the matrix omits the third registered user_term WEB_SCRAPE_HTTP_IDENTITY_USER_TERM despite the live scenario being web_scrape-rooted.

FAIL-CLOSED MATRIX LACKS AVAILABILITY CASES: empty usable_profile_aliases silently skips lowering with no finding (validation.py:192-194) and the adapter would then validate the un-lowered state - reproducing the exact probe failure Task 1 fixes; the profile_registry-is-None guard (:195-204) is unreachable in that combination. Add empty-snapshot and registry-None cases with intended per-plane behavior (web fail-closed; local-MCP documented pass).

SELECTORS BOUND TO NO NAMED TEST: all six Task 1 -k selectors select zero tests today and the plan never names the tests they must match; exit 5 reads as benign in Task 5's un-chained package. Name each required test verbatim (or run whole files) and chain Task 5's commands with &&.

ROLLBACK PATH: Step 7 overloads candidate_sha/candidate_image with previous values, ignoring the module's first-class rollback_web/rollback_doctor task definitions (ecs.tf:312,:346, variables.tf:37-43); PREVIOUS_CANDIDATE_IMAGE is format-checked but never existence-checked against the 1-day 'acceptance-' ECR lifecycle expiry; the deterministic immutable tag composer-splice-<sha12> cannot be re-pushed after a partial-failure retry (add describe-images skip-if-exists). Note: immutable tags CLOSE the plan's digest-race worry.

HIDDEN HUMAN GATES IN TASK 6: Playwright against the live deployment needs pre-seeded operator auth (playwright.config.ts:75-76, staging-global-setup.ts) against Cognito/OIDC, not the local auth provider; Step 5 curls $ALB_BASE_URL but drives Playwright at https://elspeth-aws.foundryside.dev without establishing same-origin (curl -k hides cert mismatch); Step 6 requires an authenticated interactive session. Name the auth artifact and add the operator pause.

SEQUENCING: the timeout raise (one Terraform line) does not require the new image - applying it against the CURRENTLY deployed image sidesteps the schema blocker entirely and makes the live re-run a single-variable test. Ship the timeout first standalone; deploy the new image only after the migration path exists. Task 2 Steps 1-2 (exact-authoring serializer) are separable from Step 3 (reconcile, which splice needs) - cleanest deferrable scope.
minor_issues: prompt-approved profile alias in Task 3's example is fictional; only prompt-default/prompt-secondary/content-default exist.

ToolInvocation.arguments_redacted_json does not exist as one unit: audit is ComposerToolInvocation.arguments_canonical (also carries version_before/after - useful for the replay assertion); redacted args live on ToolProposalSummary.arguments_redacted_json.

Sentinel lowering-failure test must use a stub resolver raising a sentinel-bearing message (real resolvers raise fixed vocabulary only) and should include a non-ValueError failure - validation.py:250-252 catches only ValueError.
already_applied assertion should be identity (result.updated_state is previous_state), not equality - frozen dataclass __eq__ is value-based.

Replay projection symmetry unspecified for review-staged nodes: _options_with_default_llm_reviews injects server-owned options into installed llm/web_scrape NodeSpecs, so caller-vs-installed comparison must run post-normalization or legitimate retries read as divergent (the prompt-shield happy path is unaffected).
DEADLINE_TOO_CLOSE arm must specify turn_has_discovery (every sibling non-mutating arm sets it; test_advisor_tool.py:439,:608 pin it).
Step 3's no-raw-fallback rule is scoped to ANY finding; required_control_coverage findings during incremental authoring would gut the repair loop - scope to profile/policy stages.
PluginPolicyFinding.component_id is bare/nullable vs composer's prefixed non-optional component - specify the mapping (error_class is the audit-allowlisted slot).
lower_operator_profile_options has exactly one caller (the one Task 1 removes) - decide removal or it survives as the dead second authority.
guided/steps.py:703 keeps a raw validate (COMPLETED stamp gate); rephrase 'every composer validation path' to 'every freeform tool-loop path' or sweep it.
Advisor wording: at remaining==5.0 the effective timeout is min(60,5)=5s with advisor_deadline_limited=true, not 'the ordinary advisor timeout'.
270 passes the config validator (ceiling 300 - headroom 30, compared with >) by exactly zero seconds - any future headroom bump silently breaks boot.
No ECS deployment circuit breaker: on crash-loop, services-stable blocks ~10min then exits opaquely; add deployment-status polling + log fetch.

Redaction snapshot proves declaration shape only; add a unit assertion that the splice summarizer's OUTPUT omits option values for a sentinel payload; reuse _PipelineNodeModel for splice_transform.node rather than a parallel node model.
Task 6 Step 6 cannot distinguish 'tool not declared' from 'model chose otherwise' - assert splice_transform appears in the ComposerLLMCall request tool-declaration payload.
confirmed_sound: All 12 Modify and 19 Test paths exist; both Add paths correctly absent; every core symbol (validate_authored_state, SetPipelineArgumentsModel extra=forbid, TOOLS_IN_MODULE, composition_review_contract_error, generators with --write/--check, adequacy guard) verified with claimed behavior.
Single-lowering-authority sweep clean: lower_operator_profile_options has one caller; no un-addressed lowering site exists.
Timeout chain verified end-to-end in code: ELSPETH_WEB__COMPOSER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS -> /api/system/status -> browser +25s (composer.ts:28-29); nothing else hardcodes 120.

_execute_upsert_node is well-shaped for the proposed extraction (contiguous write-boundary block, transforms.py:511-540); reconcile helper belongs in interpretation_state.py (4/5 authorities local; avoid importing _common - use the established deferred-import pattern).

Plan worries already closed by existing code: HTTP-500 bodies leak no exception text; executable YAML never persisted; compose does not stream; version races fenced by StaleComposeStateError + per-session lock; ECR digest race closed by immutable tags; local trained-operator plane is a safe no-op for Task 1.

reality.summary: No hallucinated machinery; all paths/symbols verified; Task 6 acceptance paths clean. Two majors: profile_unavailable is not what the mandated path emits, and raw-cleanup/prompt-shield-recommendation are user_terms not kinds.

architecture.summary: Diagnosis correct and Task 3 well-shaped, but: measured ~55ms catalog rebuild per validation broadened onto hot paths; the Task 1 adapter already exists twice; resolved_prompt_template_hash overloading traps the reconciliation matrix; Task 6 is independent and should ship first.

quality.summary: Blocker: Task 5's sole-failure rule cannot detect plan-caused tier-model fingerprint drift (195 baseline entries in 8 touched files). Majors: profile_unavailable unachievable; apply_pipeline_recipe regression unguarded; availability cases missing from fail-closed matrix; selectors bound to no named tests.

systems.summary: Task 6 cannot succeed as written: missing landscape migration means crash-loop or database replacement, and the forward fix invalidates rollback; the terraform package's uncommitted edits include an Aurora->RDS replacement and the ALB idle_timeout premise itself; plus rollback/ECR-lifecycle/immutable-tag and Playwright-auth gates.

synthesis.summary: Tasks 1-5 are fixable with plan edits (error-code contract, call-site completeness, catalog reuse, matrix corrections, named tests, content-based drift gate). Task 6 must be re-sequenced: raise the timeout against the deployed image first, add the schema migration + destroy/replace abort + live-ALB verification before any new-image deploy, and resolve the rollback contradiction.

notes: Both file-verifying reviewers reported Loomweave unavailable in their subagent context (.weft/loomweave/loomweave.db missing) and fell back to Grep/Read; findings are direct-read/measured, not graph-derived.

Unverifiable without AWS credentials: live terraform state vs the 5 modified files (preapply.json orphan sweep names an aurora-1 identifier, suggesting unapplied), live ALB idle_timeout, PREVIOUS_CANDIDATE_IMAGE existence in ECR, actual live column width (inferred VARCHAR(16) from the passing startup probe).
